    8501.40.009801039 
    ACTUATORS, VALVE OR DAMPER, ELECTRIC MOTOR, multi turn, NOT
 including actuators with secondary gearboxes having a torque rating
 of 100 000 Nm or less, having ALL the features listed in
 TABLE A and ONE OR MORE of the features listed in TABLE B
                            TABLE A
   (a) limit switch to full open and close position;
   (b) visual indication of valve or damper position throughout all
       stages of cycle open/close/open;
   (c) over torque switch(es);
                            TABLE B
   (a) having an output torque of LESS than 30 Nm;
   (b) two speed motor, giving two speeds of output;
   (c) variable speed motor, giving variable output speeds;
   (d) having an output power GREATER than 365 W

    8501.52.009801041 
    ACTUATORS, VALVE OR DAMPER, ELECTRIC MOTOR, multi turn, NOT
 including actuators with secondary gearboxes having a torque rating
 of 100 000 Nm or less, having ALL the features listed in
 TABLE A and ONE OR MORE of the features listed in TABLE B
                            TABLE A
   (a) limit switch to full open and close position;
   (b) visual indication of valve or damper position throughout all
       stages of cycle open/close/open;
   (c) over torque switch(es);
                            TABLE B
   (a) having an output torque of LESS than 30 Nm;
   (b) two speed motor, giving two speeds of output;
   (c) variable speed motor, giving variable output speeds;
   (d) having an output power GREATER than 365 W

    8501.52.009310099 
    ACTUATORS, valve or damper, electric motor driven, multi-turn,
  (OTHER THAN actuators imported with secondary gearboxes having a
  torque rating of 100 000 Nm or less), having ALL of the following:
    (a) facilities to permit momentary torque in excess of maximum at
        the moment the valve or damper commences to open
        (hammer blow);
    (b) emergency manual operation by means of a declutching
        mechanism;
    (c) limit switches or relays configurable to signal ANY of the
        following:
          (i) valve position;
         (ii) opening;
        (iii) closing;
         (iv) moving;
          (v) fully open;
         (vi) fully closed;
        (vii) motor tripped on torque in mid travel;
       (viii) pre-set torque exceeded;
         (ix) motor stalled;
          (x) battery low;
         (xi) actuator being operated by hand wheel;
    (d) visual indication of valve or damper position throughout all
        stages of cycle open/close/open;
    (e) over torque trip mechanism;
    (f) non intrusive infra-red commissioning

  (b)  energy capacity NOT less than 5 kWh and NOT greater than 
        80 kWh;
  (c)  current capacity NOT less than 100 Ah and NOT greater than
        1 600 Ah;
  (d)  1C rated continuous discharge and charge; 
  (e)   protection AND isolation shunt circuit breakers;
  (f)   embedded battery management system with internal trip 
protection;
  (g)  data communication ports AND wireless gateway

    8535.219207181 
    BARE CIRCUIT-BREAKERS, AC, indoor, withdrawable, using SF6 gas as
 the breaking medium, being goods specified in Column 1 of the
 following Schedule and which conform to the description in
 Column 2, 3 or 4 opposite the goods:
                       THE SCHEDULE
 COLUMN 1          COLUMN 2       COLUMN 3          COLUMN 4
 Rated Voltage     Rated Normal   Rated Short       Single Capacitor
                   Current        Circuit Breaking  Bank Breaking
                                      Current           Capacity
 exceeding 1 kV    exceeding      exceeding         exceeding
 but NOT           3 000 A        48 kA             1 250 A
 exceeding 15 kV
 exceeding 15 kV    exceeding      exceeding         exceeding
 but NOT            1 600 A        29 kA             1 250 A
 exceeding 30 kV
 exceeding 30 kV    no limit       no limit          no limit
 For the purposes of this concession:
   (a) "bare circuit-breaker" means a circuit-breaker not forming
       part of complete swithgear and not incorporating ancillary
       equipment including:
     (i) busbars;
    (ii) internal division sheets;
   (iii) control and protection equipment being protection relays,
         auxiliary relays or control switches;
   (iv) sheet metal work (including housing panels and shelves),
        but NOT excepting sheetmetal work which forms an integral
        part of a withdrawable circuit breaker;
    (v) transformers;
   (b) the terms "Rated Voltage", "Rated Normal Current", "Rated
       Short Circuit Breaking Current" and "Single Capacitor Bank
       Breaking Capacity" are as defined in Australian Standard
       2006 (High Voltage Alternating Current Circuit Breakers)
